package rulefixtures

import (
	"time"
)

// scenario for goroutine_spawn_in_loop: Raw go statements launched from inside loops without obvious WaitGroup coordination.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: concurrency; severity: contextual.
func scenario223Positive(items []string) chan int {
	results := make(chan int)
	for _, item := range items {
		go func() {
			time.Sleep(time.Millisecond)
			results <- len(item)
		}()
	}
	return results
}
